codeReview.summary: The implementation successfully adds cache invalidation to all setter functions in greetings_db.go. The worker went beyond the original requirements (SetWelcomeText, SetWelcomeToggle, SetGoodbyeText) and added cache invalidation to all 10 setter functions in the file. The cache key format 'alita:greetings:{chatID}' follows the established pattern from other modules like filters ('filter_list') and blacklists ('blacklist'). All cache invalidations occur after confirmed DB success, following the CLAUDE.md pattern.

summary: The fix-greetings-cache-invalidation feature has been successfully implemented. Cache invalidation was added to all 10 setter functions in greetings_db.go using the correct cache key format 'alita:greetings:{chatID}'. The implementation follows the established patterns from other DB modules, invalidates cache only after confirmed DB success, passes all tests, and builds successfully with no lint errors.
